section_title: Drafts drawn by one branch of a bank on another payable to order
chapter_title: Of Discharge from Liability on Notes, Bills and Cheques
text: Where any draft, that is, an order to pay money, drawn by one office of a bank upon another office of the same bank for a sum of money payable to order on demand, purports to be endorsed by or on behalf of the payee, the bank is discharged by payment in due course.
